🧩 NOT.description: "Checks the provided list of parameters and returns true if all values are falsy, false otherwise."

🧩 IF (else).description: Returns one of two values based on a boolean condition flag.

🧩 IF AND/OR.description: "Applies AND if condition is true, OR if false."

🧩 XOR.description: "Checks the provided list of parameters and returns the single truthy value if exactly one is found, false otherwise, mimicking the logical XOR operator."

🧩 OR.description: "Checks a list of parameters and returns the first truthy value. If no truthy value is found, it returns false, mimicking the logical OR (||) operator."

🧩 AND.description: "Checks the provided list of parameters and returns the first falsy value it encounters. If all values are truthy, it returns the last truthy value, mimicking the logical AND"

🧩 WEIGHTED (Advanced).description: Each condition contributes a score when its rule evaluates to true. The final result is true if the total score meets or exceeds the threshold.

🧩 IF ELSE IF (Advanced).description: Evaluates a set of conditions and returns a value based on the first matching rule.

🧩 WEIGHTED (Predefined operators).description: Each condition contributes a score when its rule evaluates to true. The final result is true if the total score meets or exceeds the threshold.

🧩 IF ELSE IF (Predefined operators).description: "IF-ELSE-IF logic with predefined comparison operators (equals, contains, starts with, regex, numeric). Returns first match or default value."

𝐎𝐁𝐉𝐄𝐂𝐓 Smart Generator - Object.description: "Transforms a source object by layering fixed, conditional, and rule-based properties. Existing properties can be preserved or overwritten. Supports custom setter for advanced assignment logic"

𝐎𝐁𝐉𝐄𝐂𝐓 From Arrays Generator - Object.description: Maps two arrays or comma-separated strings into an object. Uses the keys array length as reference — missing values become undefined and extra values are ignored.

𝐎𝐁𝐉𝐄𝐂𝐓 Transformer Generator (Advanced).description: "Transforms an object by renaming keys and applying functions to their values. Supports nested paths with dot notation, automatic structure creation, custom getter/setter functions."

𝐀𝐑𝐑𝐀𝐘 From Values Generator - Array.description: Creates an array from a simple table by extracting values from each row. Supports an optional transform function applied to each value before adding to the array.

𝐀𝐑𝐑𝐀𝐘 From Indexed Values Generator - Ar.description: Creates an ordered array from indexed values. Items are placed at their specified index — gaps become undefined. Unindexed items can optionally be appended at the end.

𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 Lazy Generator (Advanced).description: Builds a parameter object combining global and event-specific parameters. Supports dlv and lzv types — event parameters evaluate only when the input matches their pattern.
